calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-25-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER KEVIN WILSON'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

The unopposed petition to confirm arbitration award is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers. Petitioner may submit a proposed judgment.

Proposed order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
